Author: Visual Studio Code
Title: Release Highlights - March 2026
Description:
In this video, we explore several improvements across the editor experience, including Autopilot (Preview), Integrated Browser Debugging, Chat Customization (Preview), and Configurable Thinking Effort in the Model Picker. This is just a small sample of what shipped, so be sure to check out the full release notes: https://aka.ms/vscode/release
